title: Settings
contactIntro: Have a question, feedback, or need help? Write to official support or send the message below.
contactFormReplyHint: The field below is your reply email — not the support inbox address.
provisionUsersHint: Manager, HR assistant, and employee accounts are not created on this profile screen. Use the Team directory.
provisionStepOpenTeam: Open Team Directory in the sidebar.
provisionStepRole: Fill email, password, and role (e.g. Manager or HR Assistant). Only an Administrator can create another Administrator.
name: Name
subject: Subject
messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...
pendingVerificationSubtitle: Manually verify users who haven't clicked their email link.
allVerified: All users have verified their emails.

manualVerificationTips.notReceived: Use this when the user hasn't received or clicked the verification email.
manualVerificationTips.emailSent: A confirmation email may be sent to the user when verified.
manualVerificationTips.canLogin: After verification, the user can log in immediately.
manualVerificationTips.preferEmail: Email verification is preferred — use manual verification as a fallback only.
manualVerificationTips.checkMailSettings: If most users need manual verification, check the server mail settings.

enterCurrentPassword: Please enter your current password to change your password.
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
contactError: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
